mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sidos (sido_code, sido_name) VALUES
(#{s.sidoCode}, #{s.sidoName})
ON CONFLICT (sido_code) DO UPDATE SET sido_name = EXCLUDED.sido_name

INSERT INTO guguns (sido_code, gugun_code, gugun_name) VALUES
(#{g.sidoCode}, #{g.gugunCode}, #{g.gugunName})
ON CONFLICT (sido_code, gugun_code) DO UPDATE SET gugun_name = EXCLUDED.gugun_name
mapper.select: SELECT sido_code AS sidoCode, gugun_code AS gugunCode, gugun_name AS gugunName FROM guguns
SELECT sido_code, sido_name FROM sidos ORDER BY sido_code
SELECT sido_code, gugun_code, gugun_name FROM guguns WHERE sido_code = #{sidoCode} ORDER BY gugun_code
